conditions.critical_condition_basis: THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w) established as critical solvent composition where elution is independent of MW
conditions.detector: Refractive Index (RI) detector (Waters 2414) and UV detector (Waters 2996)
conditions.evidence_text: The critical solvent composition for PIB was established as THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w). ... According to Fig. 6 in THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w) PIB samples with identical chemical functionality eluted at the same position, independently of their MW.
conditions.notes: RI detector identified as the preferred concentration detector for quantitative analysis under these conditions.
